summary: Tested UI changes for summary-first architecture: convergence chart description, ρ=0.95 reference line, methodology text updates, paper detail summary rendering with 50-char filter. All 12 requested features verified successfully.
passed_tests: Convergence chart description says 'Convergence measured against final ranking at all matches' (not 'human expert')
Convergence chart shows ρ=0.95 green dashed reference line when Spearman ρ is selected
ValidationConvergence CONTENT_MODES in code has only: Abstract, Full PDF, Abstract + Summary (no Extract)
Methodology Step 1 says 'Paper Discovery & AI Impact Assessment' (not 'Full-Text Extraction')
Methodology Step 2 mentions 'abstract + AI summary' as input
Methodology Step 4 says 'Convergence-Based Stopping' with Spearman ρ description (no CI convergence)
Methodology Step 8 says 'Pre-Generated Impact Assessments' (pre-generated at fetch time)
Paper detail page (1b752605-7045-46f2-8308-a2e0142aa8a7) renders summaries with bold headings (9), bullet points (15), paragraphs (10)
Paper detail filters summaries shorter than 50 chars - shows '2 models' (openai filtered out)
Only Gemini and Claude tabs displayed (openai with 1-char summary filtered)
Leaderboard page loads correctly with 7 papers visible
Model Analysis page loads with convergence chart and reference line
critical_code_review_comments: ConvergenceSection.jsx: isLeaderboard prop correctly shows 'final ranking' description and ρ=0.95 reference line
ConvergenceSection.jsx: ValidationConvergence CONTENT_MODES correctly excludes 'extract' mode
MethodologyPage.jsx: All 10 steps updated with correct terminology (AI Impact Assessment, abstract + AI summary, Spearman ρ)
PaperPage.jsx: getSummaryEntries() filter e.text.length > 50 correctly excludes bad GPT responses
PaperPage.jsx: SummaryText component correctly renders markdown headers, bold text, and bullet points
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI changes for summary-first architecture complete. Convergence chart on /correlation shows ρ=0.95 reference line (green dashed) with Spearman ρ selected by default. Methodology page has all 10 steps with updated terminology. Paper 1b752605 shows 2 model tabs (Gemini, Claude) with proper formatting - openai filtered due to 1-char summary (<50 chars). Validation page historical data still shows 'Extract' from past experiments but ValidationConvergence component correctly only uses Abstract/Full PDF/Abstract+Summary modes.

convergence_chart.description: Convergence measured against final ranking at all matches
